Alias.name: Add target
Alias.script:
--syntax: t1 xxx, t2 xxx, t3 xxx, t4 xxx, etc.
local index = tonumber(matches[2]) local tgt = matches[3] local color = targeting.colors[tgt] or "white"
targeting[index] = tgt cecho(f"Target {index} set to: <{color}>{tgt}\n")

Alias.name: Target specific
Alias.script:
--syntax: t1, t2, t3, t4, etc.
local index = tonumber(matches[2]) local tgt = targeting[index]
if tgt then local color = targeting.colors[tgt] or "white" targeting.currtgt = tgt cecho(f"Current target set to: <{color}>{tgt}\n")
else cecho(f"<red>Target {index} not set!\n") end

Alias.name: Show targets
Clear Targets
Alias.script:
--syntax: clear tgts
for i, tgt in ipairs(targeting) do targeting[i] = nil end targeting.currtgt = nil cecho("Targets cleared.\n")

Alias.name: Set current target
Alias.script:
--syntax: tgt xxx
local tgt = matches[2] local color = targeting.colors[tgt] or "white"
targeting.currtgt = tgt cecho(f"Current target set to: <{color}>{tgt}\n")

Alias.name: Show current target
Alias.script:
--syntax: tgt
local tgt = targeting.currtgt
if tgt then local color = targeting.colors[tgt] or "white" cecho(f"Current target set to: <{color}>{tgt}\n") else cecho("<red>Current target not set!\n") end

Alias.name: Switch PK Modes
Attack Target
Alias.script:
--syntax: p
local tgt = targeting.currtgt
if tgt then send(f"k {tgt}") else cecho("<red>Current target not set!\n") end

Alias.name: Attack h.Target
Alias.script:
--syntax: o
local tgt = targeting.currtgt
if tgt then send(f"k h.{tgt}") else cecho("<red>Current target not set!\n") end

Alias.name: Special on target
Alias.script:
--syntax: q
weaving = weaving or {}
local tgt = targeting.currtgt local pkmode = targeting.pkmode
if tgt then if not pkmode or pkmode == "none" then cecho("<red>No pk method set\n") elseif pkmode == "channel" then if weaving.longweave then send(f"channel '{weaving.longweave}' h.{tgt}") else send(f"channel 'ice spikes' h.{tgt}") end else send(f"{pkmode} h.{tgt}") end else cecho("<red>Current target not set!\n") end

Alias.name: Diagnose h.target
Alias.script:
--syntax: a
local tgt = targeting.currtgt
if tgt then send(f"diagnose h.{tgt}") else cecho("<red>Current target not set!\n") end

Script.name: targeting initializations
Script.script:
targeting = targeting or {pkmode = "bash"}
targeting.colors = { dark = "ansi_red", light = "ansi_cyan", trolloc = "ansi_red", myrddraal = "ansi_red", dreadlord = "ansi_red", grayman = "ansi_red", draghkar = "ansi_red", human = "ansi_cyan", seanchan = "ansi_magenta", ogier = "ansi_green", aiel = "ansi_white" }
